Subject: Promoting Community Solidarity and Supporting Iran’s Democratic Transition
Body:
Dear {{RepresentativeFullName}},

I am writing to you as a resident of {{RidingOrRegion}} (Postal Code: {{PostalCode}}) regarding the ongoing struggle for democracy in Iran. Our municipal government has a proud history of standing for human rights and ensuring that all members of our diverse community feel safe, heard, and supported.

The Iranian-Canadian community in our city is deeply affected by the regime’s repression in Iran. At this critical moment, I urge you and City Council to take the following actions within municipal jurisdiction:

1. Proclamations and symbolic support
I request that the mayor’s office issue an official proclamation recognizing the Iranian people’s struggle for a secular democracy. Such a gesture, along with raising the historic Iranian Lion and Sun flag at City Hall, provides vital moral support to the many Iranian-Canadians who call our city home.

2. Ensuring community safety and protection
Many members of our local diaspora have expressed concerns regarding harassment and transnational repression. I ask that you work with our local police service to ensure that our community feels protected from any foreign interference or intimidation within city limits.

3. Recognition of democratic leadership
The Iranian diaspora as well as those inside the country haves clearly identified Prince Reza Pahlavi as a central figure for a democratic transition. I encourage the city to acknowledge the aspirations of the local Iranian-Canadian community and, where possible, welcome opportunities for dialogue that reflect the democratic will of the diaspora.

4. Public commemoration
I propose that the city consider naming a public space, such as a park, street, or community room, in honor of the victims of the Iranian regime. This would serve as a lasting reminder of our city’s commitment to global justice and the courage of those fighting for freedom.

5. Inclusive community programming
I urge the city to support local cultural events and town halls hosted by the Iranian-Canadian community. Providing accessible municipal venues for these gatherings helps foster a sense of belonging and allows residents to share their vision for a free and democratic Iran with fellow neighbours.

Our city is built on the values of inclusion and respect for human dignity. By taking these local steps, our municipality joins a global network of cities standing on the right side of history.

Thank you for your dedication to our community and for considering this request. I look forward to hearing how our city will show its support.

Sincerely,
[YOUR NAME HERE]
[YOUR PHONE NUMBER HERE]
